case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. NATALIE J KILMER et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KILMER, NATALIE J DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-29-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC SERVED JUL-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KILMER, NATALIE J
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KILMER, NATALIE J
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KILMER, NATALIE J
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-20-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
